rationale: The cited paper is a mechanism-focused referral-program study (better matching/social enrichment explaining referred customers’ margin and churn advantages), and the citing paper explicitly positions itself as extending referral-program work on referred-customer value and mechanisms. Given this strong construct and research-gap overlap, plus a direct DOI match (10.1509/jmr.14.0653), this is plausibly a foundational/comparison citation rather than an incidental mention.
